user_query: show me anomaly routes departing from albania
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalous routes originating from Albania by analyzing alarm events and traveler counts.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for events departing from Albania (codice_paese_part='alb'). Groups by route (departure-arrival airports) to compute per-route alarm totals. tot is the count of alarms per route, the metric to monitor for anomalies.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for travelers departing from Albania (codice_paese_part='alb'). Groups by route to compute per-route alarm counts. allarmati is the count of alarmed travelers, the metric to monitor for anomalies.
